free_text: reactions on copper by activation method.
Irradiation time was 8-12 hours, beam flux was
The copper foils had square shape with the (10*10 cm)
size and thickness of 0.0128 cm. The foils had
natural isotope composition (69.15% of Cu-63 and
30.85% of Cu-65). The purity of the Cu metal was
better than 99%. The content of impurities (such as
Ti, V, Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Zn) was lesser than 0.020%.
Several detectors were used. Distances of the
measured samples from the detector ranged from 4 cm
*By authors* Linear fit on logarithmic energy scale
of cross sections of monitor reactions was done for
estimation of uncertainties of beam monitoring
DEIMOS32 code for gamma spectra analysis was used
Error of linear fit of monitor reactions
cross-sections is the main source of systematic
Uncertainties of correction factor of the
Monitor cross section were taken from free text p. 64.
No reply from authors was received.
